mood: hushed, luminous, and suspended, like a public passage holding a secret after closing time
lighting: wide magenta-to-wine gradient wash with a soft central bloom, dim edge falloff, and a faint cobalt reflection along the floor
object_inventory: one monumental rounded rectangular gate in rose plaster
one secondary smoked-glass listening slit on the left wall
one secondary low brushed-aluminum curb crossing the foreground
nine quiet source-anchor marks as labels, pinholes, seams, and tiny lit apertures
large unoccupied gradient wall and floor planes
negative_constraints: no chapel, roller room, printmaking, or splatter-canvas imagery
no equal-weight grid of source objects
